description_long: This casino is a grand, multi-story building with ornate architectural features and a striking gold roof. The structure includes two prominent towers, one taller and more rectangular with a clock face, and the other rounder with a conical spire, both topped with golden spires. The facade is richly decorated with detailed moldings, arched windows, and stonework, giving it a luxurious and historic appearance. A semi-circular staircase leads up to the main entrance, which is framed by a decorative fence and gate, enhancing the sense of exclusivity. The building is surrounded by a perimeter fence with gold-tipped posts, and the overall color palette features gold, gray, and stone hues. The design suggests a blend of Neo-Gothic and Victorian influences, making it a visually impressive landmark in any urban setting.
description: A lavish, multi-towered casino with gold spires, ornate stonework, and a grand semi-circular entrance staircase, surrounded by a decorative fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a semi-circular staircase, two ornate towers, and the detailed facade with gold roofing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the round tower with a conical spire and the depth of the building, as well as the side section of the fence.
description_view_2: Rear or opposite side view displaying the length of the building, the gold roof, and the detailed window arrangements.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the taller rectangular tower, the side of the building, and the continuation of the semi-circular staircase and fence.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance features a grand semi-circular staircase leading up to a set of double doors, flanked by decorative fencing and posts. The entrance is accentuated by ornate stonework and possibly arched doorways, giving it a stately and inviting appearance.
attribute_facade_ornamentation: The facade is richly ornamented with decorative moldings, arched windows, pilasters, and gold-tipped spires. There are also detailed stone reliefs and motifs around the windows and along the roofline, contributing to the building's opulent and historic look.
attribute_architectural_style: Neo-Gothic with Victorian influences, characterized by pointed spires, ornate stonework, and elaborate decorative elements.
